_note: The gentrx_bucket access_key_id / secret_access_key below are intentionally public. They are READ-ONLY credentials scoped to a single benchmark gradient bucket (no write/admin/cross-resource access) and are the same pair every participant already publishes on-chain via the Commitments pallet. Committing them here is deliberate, not a leak; do not rotate or move them to env injection without coordinating the on-chain commitment.
